Video.summary: Ed Sullivan presents George Carlin's election year, Professor Backward's letter to mother, Hendra and Ullett's Mets fan explains baseball to a Brit, Jacke Vernon's dull men's club, Stiller and Meara's mother of student demonstrator.
Video.grandparentTitle: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show
Video.title: George Carlin, Professor Backwards, Hendra and Ullett, Jackie Vernon, Stiller and Meara

Video.summary: Ed Sullivan presents Richard Pryor "Navy Seal, First Drive, Attempts to Sing, School Day Memory," Dick Shawn "Civil War," Rodney Dangerfield "Marriage, No Respect," John Byner "Impressions," Totie Fields "Fan Letters."

Video.summary: Ed Sullivan presents Moms Mabley "Her Hearing," Sid Caesar "Meeting Girl's Parents," Jack Paar "His New House," Pat Cooper and Scoey Mitchell "A Black Man Moves Into an Italian Neighborhood."

Video.summary: Clips and reminiscences from the 23-year variety series include archival footage of Julie Andrews, George Carlin, Ella Fitzgerald, Judy Garland, Elvis Presley, and Flip Wilson; host Carol Burnett. At the Ed Sullivan Theatre in New York.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show
Video.title: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show

Image.alt: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show

Video.summary: The Smothers Brothers introduce memorable moments from the variety show of the '60s: comedy, rock, soul; celebrity interviews, impersonators, novelty acts.
Video.grandparentTitle: A Really Big Show: Ed Sullivan's 50th Anniversary
Video.title: A Really Big Show: Ed Sullivan's 50th Anniversary
